title: The Forgotten Fruits
description: this mod adds fruits that have their own wacky twist
body:
many fruits have been forgotten in time many for a good reason... others.. not so much. never know what one will do or cause to happen. BE CAREFULL with what fruit you eat or else... very TRAGIC things may happen.
 

about

this is a small mod that adds a few fruits to the game (more in the future) all with a wacky, weird and sometimes deadly out come 

 

 

 

This is my best mod yet! its one of my favorite only took me around 4 days to make but I'm still gonna add more!

 

music disc -forgor is a work in progress!

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOkglNq59ZbZKL0iwU_WEGA

                                                 ^

Official TFF youtube Channel  ^  go subscribe ;D

 

This mod is also avalible on Curseforge
 

hope you enjoy! ;)
